query:
ALTER TABLE users 
  ADD COLUMN plan ENUM('fish','reg','shark') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'fish' AFTER language,
  ADD COLUMN monthlyHandsUsed INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER plan,
  ADD COLUMN monthlyCoachUsed INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 AFTER monthlyHandsUsed,
  ADD COLUMN usageResetDate VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT NULL AFTER monthlyCoachUsed;
